# Usama Javed - Senior Full Stack Developer & AI Integration Specialist

> Usama Javed is a senior full-stack developer and AI integration specialist based in Perth, Western Australia with 8+ years of experience delivering 50+ enterprise projects across government, mining, fintech, and healthcare sectors. He builds high-performance web applications using Next.js 15, React 19, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud-native architectures on AWS, Azure, and GCP.

Usama Javed operates as an independent software consultant serving Perth, Western Australia, and clients across Australia and internationally. He specializes in enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, NetSuite customization, N8N workflow automation, Voice AI agents, and full-stack SaaS platforms. His technical expertise spans frontend frameworks (React, Vue, Angular), backend systems (Node.js, Python Django, Java Spring Boot, C# .NET), databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch), and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD).

## Services
- [Web Development](https://usamajaved.com.au/services): Custom web applications, e-commerce, PWAs, SaaS platforms
- [AI & Automation](https://usamajaved.com.au/services#ai-automation): OpenAI integration, chatbots, Voice AI, ML model deployment
- [Enterprise Solutions](https://usamajaved.com.au/services#enterprise): ERP systems, NetSuite, CRM development, government portals
- [Cloud Architecture](https://usamajaved.com.au/services#cloud): AWS, Azure, GCP deployment, Docker, Kubernetes orchestration
- [Mobile Development](https://usamajaved.com.au/services#mobile): React Native cross-platform iOS and Android applications

## Projects
- [N8N Automation Platform](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/n8n-automation): Enterprise workflow automation system reducing manual processes by 70%
- [Voice AI Booking Agent](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/voice-ai-agent): AI-powered customer service agent handling 500+ daily bookings
- [Enterprise ERP System](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/erp-system): Full-scale NetSuite ERP for mining company with 200+ users
- [NetSuite Integration Suite](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/netsuite-integration): Custom API integrations connecting 12+ business systems
- [Cloud Infrastructure Platform](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/cloud-infrastructure): Scalable microservices handling 100k+ concurrent users
- [Modern Portfolio](https://usamajaved.com.au/projects/modern-portfolio): Next.js 15 portfolio with perfect Lighthouse scores
